item.title: The Macroeconomic Consequences of Structural Change: Pension Reforms, Intergenerational Transfers, and Wealth Inequality (JMP)
Tax Reforms and Return Heterogeneity: Quantitative Insights on Wealth Inequality and Welfare
Aging, Inequality, and Fiscal Sustainability: Labor Supply, Saving, and the Long-Run Debt Path
Dynamic Life-Cycle Model Replication in Julia (De Nardi, 2004)
item.description: Code, notebook, and write-up available on and as an .

item.title: Starting the IMF Fund Internship Program (FIP) this summer
item.description:
I’ll be joining the International Monetary Fund this summer as part of the Fund Internship Program (FIP), from June through August 2026.

During the internship, I’ll be working on a research question studying how differing demographic trends across countries shape the equilibrium quantity and price of safe assets globally — and, in turn, the level and dynamics of the global equity premium.

item.title: Macroeconomic Theory (Undergraduate)

item.title: A Face-Off between Markets and Institutions: Evidence from En-Masse Pharmaceutical Product Ban in India

Distress Propagation on Production Networks: Coarse-Graining and Modularity of Linkages
item.description: Published in Physica A: Statistical Mechanics and its Applications, 2021, vol. 568.
